author: SherriEliza
title: Used to be great
body: I paid for the premium version of this app and it has completely stopped working for me. None of my music files will play. I emailed the support contact and have heard nothing back. Super disappointing.

author: ESH@DOW_H0KAG@ No K!zzy
title: MBP The Most Elite.
body: Phenomenal Perfect Peek Performance & Storage.

author: Ksagosen
title: Kristian
body: Ingen abonnement, bare strømming av dine egne MP3’er fra Dropbox eller lignende. Lett å bruke, perfekt for oss som er litt old-school og vil eie egen digital musikk.

author: asproject
title: The best
body: Yesss

author: ghalib86
title: Great app with one annoying visual flaw
body:
I've really enjoyed using Musicbox so far. However, there's no way to adjust the font size, and that's a real usability issue. Many album and song titles are cut off mid-word or shown as ellipses, which makes it frustrating to navigate or even recognize what's playing, especially with longer filenames or detailed metadata.

A simple option to scale the font size down (or allow smaller text for title views) would go a long way in making the app cleaner and more readable for users.

Looking forward to future updates. Great potential here.

author: Resetian
title: Pound for pound - The Best
body:
I have been using this app since... 2018? Something like that. I can say nothing other than it's a legendary app and I will endorse it whenever!

Thanks!

author: super_novel
title: 課金無しでのAudiobook対応がありがたい
body:
Audiobookのm4bファイルに必須なBook Markが使えるのでありがたいが、Book mark名には自動で書籍名を入力して欲しい。一々手入力するのは面倒。
また、Audiobookを再生する場合には、専用のインターフェースを用意してほしい。例えばランダム再生のボタンがあるが、音楽再生には必要なボタンでもオーディオブック再生の場合には不要な機能です。間違ってタップするとダウンロードが始まるので迷惑です。
オーディオブック再生について、どのようなインターフェースが適切であるか真摯に検討していただきたい。
課金してでも使いたくなるアプリにぜひ進化していただきたいと思います。

author: arjen54321
title: Very useful but..
body: I found it a bit hard to figure out how to use it optimally, and besides of that suddenly there are hiccups in the Crossfade; maybe it’s me, but it does some unexpected things like changing the order..

author: fendstat
title: It just works!
body: I simply 1) put my music files in a folder Dropbox, then 2) browse to that folder in Musicbox, and 3) press “download”, and 4) all that music appears in Musicbox on my device! Then I play that music on my device. It sounds simple and it is, but so many other players fail to do these seemingly-simple things.

author: バナナキッド
title: さすがに広告がきつい
body:
シンプルなUIは気に入ってましたが、起動する度に、スキップできない全面広告が出て操作不能になるため、音楽を聞きたい時にすぐ再生できないのが地味にストレスでした。
しかし、広告OFFだけのために1500円は買い切りでもあまりコスパよろしくないので、使うのをやめました！

シンプルな音楽プレイヤーアプリは少ないので、今後、機能は最小限でいいので広告だけ無しになる買い切り500円程度のプランを設定されるようでしたら、再度使いたいと思います。
ありがとうございました。

author: Paulc31
title: Très bien, mais un bug gênant
body: J’ai copié dans Dropbox un certain nombre de CD classiques. C’est la première application que je trouve qui enchaîne les morceaux sont coupés le début de chacun. Mais il y a un bug gênant : il ne sait pas classer les pistes dans le bon ordre: elles sont dans l’ordre suivant par exemple : 1  10 11 12… puis 2 3 etc. Ça ne fonctionne correctement que si il y a moins de 10 pistes. Facile à corriger !!!

author: MlieB51
title: Perfect
body: Great app to use with Dropbox. No bug, easy to use and well made. Good job from developper. Thank you for this!

author: Chalizardking
title: Such fun
body:
•will auto find artwood for all song titles and even try for made up titles. 
•Best transitions into the next song ever
•Links with everything 
•Basicly a Dawson's Creek Trapper Keeper Ultra Keeper Futura S 2000

author: jazzyJeffNY
title: Amazing
body: I was hoping Dropbox would come up with something like this for years but just found it and I'm so happy to be able to stream my music finally anywhere without selecting one track after the other! Thank you 🥳

author: AlexWiesbaden
title: Eine Bessere Alternative zu Apple Musik?
body: Ich habe eine umfangreiche digitale Musiksammlung und habe bisher die Musik-App von Apple genutzt. Allerdings stört mich, dass die App ohne ein abgeschlossenes Musikabo an vielen Stellen einschränkend oder nervig ist. Daher habe ich meine gesamte Musiksammlung in die Dropbox übertragen und die App Musicbox verwendet. Nach der ersten Synchronisation, die zwei Tage dauerte, waren Cover, Alben, Interpreten usw. sauber in der Musikbibliothek eingeordnet. Auch der Player lässt keine Wünsche offen. Ich habe zuvor einige andere Programme ausprobiert, aber Musicbox übertrifft alle – und das für weniger als 10 €, ohne Abo!

author: dave_newton
title: I’d like to like it more.
body: With sorting non-functional and no way to tag and filter its usefulness for me is limited. It was easier than writing my own, but that’s temporary, because I need stronger functionality 🤷‍♂️

author: John Lazz
title: No support provided, while asking money to pay for a paid version?
body:
Hi there!

I love the idea of your app, but when I click on the Local Files tab, there is no Dropbox option there, as the only options that are visible are Downloads and iCloud.

How could someone be able to listen to music that has been set as Available Offline in the Dropbox app, from Music Box?

The only place Dropbox is showing up as an option is Networks, and it’s not accessible without internet connection.

I have sent this question already through feedback around a 7-10 days ago, but never heard back from you.

When you click on support, and you get on the website of Jmobbi.com, the Send Email option doesn’t work. Twitter and Facebook shortcuts don’t work either, and I am unable to locate your page on social media in order to contact you there.

I would purchase the paid version, if you would set Dropbox as an option in your Local Files tab, and provide actual support to your users.

Thanks

author: Dwight Ivany
title: Purchased premium but it did not last
body: I purchased premium. When I broke my screen premium was not recognized and I’m running limited.

author: quientiroelpedo
title: Big improvements
body: There was time when this app wasn’t working quite right a few years ago, somehow playback was just borked, I tried to get a kite to the developer, but apple was stupid about it and thought I hadn’t bought the app — then, lo and behold, the developer updated it and made it performant and so feature rich— it’s my favorite jukebox app ever.  My hat is off.

author: dav3punk
title: Not worth it. Refund please.
body: In theory this can work great, however it’s impossible to get music into it and the workflow is just poor. Test your app before releasing.

title: Feature request

we can't edit audio file's details in app. That will good if have a option for that.
 If we can change secondary colors ,that will good in personalization.
 If possible to add lyrics playing feature, that will great to sing along.
 Wish you making Musicbox better

author: entity655321
title: Helps with Music Production
body: As a music producer needing to listen to my countless bounced sessions, this is a perfect application. For a while there were some bugs but the new update has solved them - I think 👀. The interface is sufficient and simple enough to be a pleasure to use. The features are also very useful like EQ and playlist capabilities. I rely on this app for my workflow - I was heartbroken when the glitches prevented my use. But now so far so good.

Great music app.
There’s a bug that we can’t switch between songs,albums,artists tabs in library.

we can’t edit audio file’s details in app. That will good if have a option for that.
If we can change secondary colors ,that will good in personalization.
If possible to add lyrics playing feature, that will great to sing along.
Wish you making Musicbox better🎉

author: markoc01
title: The best music player for Dropbox!
body: Amazing player! With the recent update works flawlessly again. Treats a Dropbox folder just like a track list, you can seek, works perfectly with my car’s Bluetooth, repeat, & shuffle also work perfectly. Use it as a constant part of my music production workflow.

author: fiddins
title: Good but with caveats
body: I like how it looks, controls and streams music from my Dropbox, setup is easy too. Major issue is while it can stream and play flac files, they don’t get added to the music library for some reason, seems like a bug or oversight but is quite annoying.

author: Ryanlikes***
title: Thanks for update!
body: Before this last update, I would have given it 3 stars; constant crashing and whatnot. But the new GUI is great, and it seems like most if not all problems were fixed! Thanks!

author: Jovi88Hun
title: Thank You!
body: Thanks for updating the app! I've been using it for years! Now bug free and the best app!

author: DouglasRosebank
title: I love it again!
body: I previously gave this app a 1 star review because an iOS update caused it to get very buggy for ages. Well as of now it’s all fixed and it’s great again! Thank you!

author: Feliksas
title: Best Alternative Audio Player
body: Since I switched to this app years ago I've never looked back: true freedom from iTunes and other apps. Works great with imported or cloud files.

author: Chris1 Charles
title: One way to fix sudden crash
body: I notice that the music suddenly crash at the end of the one song. The way I fix it is to go to setting-audio player-crossfade playback-disable it. I found it fix the problem most of time but crash occasionally. At least I can play continuously when I drive using CarPlay

author: Gkhausie
title: Dropbox playback bugs
body: Full of Dropbox playback bugs.  ????

author: trend2017
title: Good app overall
body: Overall a good app but not with iOS 16. It keeps crashing when clicking on a new song. I’ve reloaded,  etc but keeps happening.

author: cgilbreath
title: Impressively bad
body: This app is impressive, in that it’s impressive that they managed to develop an app that’s more useless than just playing songs/files one at a time in the Dropbox app itself. An ad plays every time the app starts up, and crashes 9 out of 10 times after playing the first song in a playlist, forcing the user to re-open the app and watch another ad. Literally more effort than just playing songs one at a time in Dropbox. Impressive

author: what..".....
title: Does not work
body: It constantly stops playback without any reason. Do not buy this app, waste of money.

author: Naschka
title: Synchronisiert nicht alle Interpreten, Alben und Songs
body: Nach 20 Stunden  Synchronisation werden nicht alle Interpreten („Darsteller“) erkannt. Pro Album sind max. 5 Songs, meist nur 1-2 synchronisiert. Die Cover der Alben werden nur teilweise richtig dargestellt, häufig erscheint ein und daselbe Cover für verschiedene Interpreten. Es gibt nirgends eine richtige Bedienungsanleitung oder FAQ und die App. ist nicht immer selbsterklärend. Auch der Unterschied zwischen der kostenlosen Version und der Pro-Version ist mir nicht ganz klar. Liegt die lückenhafte Synchronisation eventuell an der kostenlosen Version oder dauert die Synchronisation mehrere Tage? Schade, die App. machte einen guten Eindruck, aber wenn kein Zugriff auf die gesamte Musik möglich ist und keine Erklärung zu finden ist, woran das liegen könnte, gibt es nur 2 Sterne.

body: I love this app. It’s a gem…. When it works. It’s constantly quitting. And I cannot seem to get the developer Igor M to respond no matter how many times I’ve written to him. Such a shame. This little app has so much potential. As much as I WANT to recommend it, I just can’t. Sad.

body: it was my most used app before i updated my ipad... and then it crapped out on me, which means now I'm floundering to find a proper substitute. the fact that it hardly lets you pick one file before it crashes is atrocious. my life revolves around the music i play, especially while i sleep at night. life is too short to be frustrated like this. please fix Musicbox. thank you.

After playing a song or 2, it crashes and has to be reopened. The app needs an update to fix that crash bug and it’ll be way better.

author: janjgroot
title: Used to be great
body:
Support email does not exist. Messages to it get bounced. App crashes every time I manually choose the next song. Very bad. 
The app is cluttered. It had great potential but it is nearly impossible to find back songs I’ve added from Dropbox. Needs work. One of these app I would love to love but it just doesn’t cut it.

author: Aebu
title: When it works properly…
body:
I honestly really love this app - when it’s working properly. I even prefer it over streaming devices usually. 

HOWEVER, my entire library has been   erased three times in the past couple of years. I finally got smart and screenshotted the  list of songs I had, which was substantial. I then had to rebuild my library one by one. 

The other problem I am currently  experiencing is that the player will play a song and then not just stop, but exit the program entirely. I’m not sure what to do about this.

There are some other reviews complaining about this issue so it is likely more than a local problem.

title: Love it, but unstable since iOS 16
body:
I’ve been using this player (paid version) for ages now and I love it. Unfortunately, since updating my iPhone to iOS16, the app has been crashing a lot, especially when going from one playlist track to another track on a different playlist (both saved locally on the phone).

Not sure if a new app version is in the works, but I’d really love to see this fixed.

author: Infinaneek
title: Room for improvement
body:
Generally ok. Can't seem to 'favourite' or bookmark Dropbox folders, which is a big shame. 
I'm a professional music producer and all client work is in Dropbox. So I need to be able to play through folders like they're albums. 

My workaround is to add the folder to a playlist but that causes issues too - the app crashes when skipping tracks in a 'Dropbox' playlist. 
Often the DB folders are updated regularly so means always making a new playlist.

author: Architectural Designer
title: The best MP3 player for Dropbox
body: Exactly what I was looking for!  Where the app stores my MP3 files inside my cellphone; instead of Dropbox acting as a backup drive. The app doesn’t have to be connected to Dropbox like with the other MP3 player apps.  Now I’m able to keep my Dropbox empty of any files.  With the other MP3 players, when I emptied my Dropbox, I lost all my music after painstakingly creating four folders and saving the songs accordingly.   With Musicbox app this was not a problem.

But after iOS 16, it constantly closes suddenly when selecting songs. It plays the first song fine generally. But when selecting a second or third song the app will suddenly close. I hope the developer is able to fix. I’ll come back and rate higher. Also, please fix your support email. Thanks.

author: periskope
title: Excellent!
body:
Before I discovered this app, I used another app to listen to my music on Dropbox. It didn’t meet my needs and was very problematic.

This app, however, far exceeded my expectations, has all the features that I was looking for, and surprised me with things that I had never thought of putting in a cloud audio player app!

author: newlistnerthislifetime
title: Good app needs an update
body: Some bugs in current version - metadata sync grinds up. Would very much like option to edit metadata for songs so I can group them by album/artist myself. Primarily want to use this as a replacement for Apple’s terrible music player.

author: Beans3174
title: Album not showing?

author: pjones192
title: shady… be wary of this app.
body:
TL:DR; first time worked perfectly, then i paid for PRO, then it basically stopped doing all the things i needed (and had paid for). downloading the songs doesn’t work, cannot play the undownloaded songs over LTE, so basically if you’re connected to wifi 24/7 then i guess okay, but if you want to listen in the car or if your wifi is unreliable, find a different app. (also extremely shady that it worked no problem first time and then completely crapped out.)

i downloaded some songs, was able to get them from dropbox to this app and also download them (my ultimate goal, meaning i could play them even in an area offline.) so a day or two later, i downloaded some more songs. this time, NO MATTER WHAT i did, which internet i connected to (and i have VERY high speed internet so speed is not the issue), i COULD NOT DOWNLOAD THEM. i mean i got them from dropbox to the app, but could not download them, thus defeating the purpose since i wanted to access them offline. (keep in mind that YES i did pay the $4.99 for PRO so it wasn’t that i had reached the file limit or anything.)
FURTHERMORE…
(and this is HUGE because the above could have been forgiven)
you cannot play the songs (the ones that have not been downloaded) over LTE.
so i can’t play any of my songs with this app in my car. (except for the ones i was able to successfully download on the very first day.)

this is incredibly frustrating and if i could get a refund i would. i won’t go through all that hassle for $5 (which is what this company is obviously hoping for).

i just want to say shame on you. i know $5 doesn’t seem like a lot but it is to some people. i think it’s set up so it works flawlessly the first time, then people pay for PRO, and then it stops working.

i have never said this unironically before, but DO BETTER.

author: matinum
title: Right idea but…
body: Very clunky interface. I have the Pro version and I tried to import files from Dropbox a month ago and I still can’t figure out why so much of my music is missing. Really needs to simplify the interface. Select folders you want to download and just do it already. Also need more sort options- sort by year produced would be nice. I always feel lost in the app- the functionality is very siloed out and you’re always navigating from one silo to the other to get it to do what you want. Improve on these points and you have a home run!

author: Zakkudo
title: Nice player.  Has polish issues.
body:
I have switched to this player from Apple Music to play my Dropbox music collection.  The player is overall good.  Nice interface.

The bad:
- It took days to sync the metadata in Dropbox for about 1000 songs
- It sometimes stops playing after a single track
- getting custom artwork working was harder than expected.  It was very hard to get it to stop using incorrect artwork.  Had to go through the 1000 song sync w few times.

Peccato...

author: crafah
title: Needs drag and drop playlist reordering and folder sync
body:
Good app filling in a missing feature in Dropbox’s own app. I would gladly pay for this app if it had the following features:

1: drag and drop playlist reordering. The current system, which bumps the selected track to the top of the list, is very tedious. 

2: simple Dropbox folder sync: it would be great to simply select a Dropbox folder where a music library is stored, and to have the app check that folder for new music and synchronize its library any time there are new tracks.

author: Gvldenrican
title: Best Thing Ever
body: I have never written a review a day in my life but this app made me want to express my joy! For a free app, and a $2.99 upgrade to pro, they don’t receive the credit they deserve. This is an amazing app that transfers downloads, I use Dropbox, to your phone and it even has metadata so the album art transfers over! Sometimes the art isn’t correct, but it’s based up on where you downloaded it from or what the algorithm is reading. It’s literally a great music player with features Spotify and Apple Music doesn’t have, like a sleep timer and smooth transition into the next song as if you were a DJ. I cannot explain how happy I am to have found this app. PLEASE never delete this app, I would cry.

author: Po1ntBlxnk
title: Best Offline Music Cache App
body: Increasing good quality standards as you can set everything to how you want it apart from your saves on Dropbox, which is very useful and don’t need to upgrade to full version to use most of the utilities.

author: macribas
title: Almost perfect
body:
This app is great, but it needs to improve in a key aspects:
1. The workflow of getting your audio files form Dropbox: there are too many ways of accomplishing the same thing. You can import files, you can find them directly in Dropbox, then you can create playlists and add files from Dropbox or local files... you never know where your files are.
2. Navigating within an audio file: the rewind and forward buttons don’t do what they mean. The icons on those buttons universally mean they should skip a few seconds when long pressed. But these don’t, they move to the next audio file. The icons to skip to the previous or next song are different. 
3. Missing Skip 15 Seconds buttons: key for long audio files like audiobooks, interviews, meetings, etc.
Keep up the good work!

author: Bitania Parker
title: eigentlich bin ich begeistert
body:
endlich eine App, die mir eine Kopie meiner Hörbücher, die ich in meiner Dropbox habe, darstellt und ich sie entweder streamen oder runter laden und auf dem iPhone hören kann. 
Leider wird beim runterladen des HBs aus der Dropbox der Name des HB  verändert, indem eine Zahlenfolgen davor gestellt wird, was echt nervt. Also muss ich es immer umbenennen.
Außerdem werden nicht alle Cover mit runter geladen, obwohl sie im Track sind.

Leider besteht aber seit dem neuen iOS 13 keine Möglichkeit mehr das HB nach dem runterladen umzubenennen oder es wieder aus der App zu löschen ... die App hängst sich jetzt jedesmal bei solchen Actionen auf 😕

Bitte bitte ändern, damit ich die App wieder richtig nutzen kann 🥺

author: B637K
title: 5 STARS - 1 PROBLEM
body:
Everything is great besides the lack of two buttons: 

1. forward 5 seconds
2. back 5 seconds

Please solve this. By the way, if that option was only in the paid version, the rest of the app is so great that I’d gladly upgrade for the feature to be added! :) 

I use this app to listen to very long interviews, and at times to transcribe. The speed changer is essential for that and I love that and the fact that it links to Dropbox :) but when I miss one word and I have to manually rewind a second with the slider bar during a 2 hour long interview, it gets tiresome. 

Thanks!! 

PS I would have just written the developer on this instead of writing a problem in the comments—but I couldn’t find a developer email in the App Store... 🤷🏼‍♂️

author: Silverbone23
title: Login Failure
body:
I want this to work so bad so I can ditch iTunes, but I get a login failure before I even have a chance to enter any username password info. I’ve double checked Dropbox and I am logged in in the app. This is a MAJOR flaw making the app useless and it seems I’m not the only one with this issue. The devs need to get on this immediately. I’m happy to revise my rating and review if this gets fixed.

UPDATE: I was finally able to log in to Dropbox via the app, and was able to locate my Music folder. However it’s been syncing music continuously for three days now and has only downloaded 135 tunes. I have no idea what’s happening, but I am still not able to use this app.
